source: Official DFormer data pipeline audit after R014 failed below 0.53
hypothesis: Official DFormer NYU label mapping 0->255 ignore and 1..40->0..39 is required before judging the gap to DFormerv2-S official results.
proposed_change_scope: Map labels once in final daima/src/data_module.py after augmentation/tensor conversion, and simplify final daima/src/utils/metrics.py so metrics consume canonical train-id labels plus 255 ignore. Run dformerv2_mid_fusion as a new official-label baseline reset.
expected_signal: Contract reset baseline; not directly comparable to old-contract 0.517397 as an improvement claim.
risk: Changes label/ignore semantics, so historical mIoU values are not directly comparable. Double-shift would corrupt labels, so metrics must not apply the old dynamic min>=1 decrement.
forbidden_change_check: No dataset split file, eval formula, validation/test loader size or shuffle behavior, augmentation, optimizer, scheduler, batch size, max_epochs, lr, num_workers, early_stop_patience, backbone, encoder, decoder, checkpoint artifact, dataset, pretrained weight, or TensorBoard event log change.
evidence_or_reference: Official DFormer RGBXDataset gt_transform does gt - 1; local raw NYU labels include 0..40. Current old sanitize_labels can leave raw 0 as class 0 and mask raw 40 as ignore. R015 completed best val/mIoU 0.537398 at validation epoch 45 under fixed recipe.
notes: This is the new official-label baseline coordinate system and satisfies the fixed-recipe 0.53 stage target. Later experiments should compare against R015 under the official-label contract.

source: Existing PMAD/PrimKD logit-only 5-run evidence in final daima docs and miou_list
hypothesis: The repeat-backed PMAD logit-only w=0.15/T=4 setting remains the strongest current positive KD direction and may produce a high-tail run approaching the 0.53 goal while adding one more stability sample.
proposed_change_scope: No model-structure change. Use existing dformerv2_primkd_logit_only with kd_weight=0.15, kd_temperature=4.0, frozen geometry-primary teacher, and save_student_only. Only keep train.py UTF-8/TQDM callback process fix.
expected_signal: Based on prior 5-run mean 0.520795 and best 0.524028, expected best val/mIoU is 0.514-0.525; success only if a high-tail run reaches >=0.53.
risk: This is a repeat rather than a new mechanism, so decision value is high mainly for goal chasing and stability estimation; prior distribution had not reached 0.53.
forbidden_change_check: No dataset split, eval metric, mIoU calculation, validation/test loader, augmentation, optimizer, scheduler, batch size, max_epochs, lr, num_workers, early_stop_patience, backbone, encoder, checkpoint artifact, dataset, pretrained weight, or TensorBoard event log change.
evidence_or_reference: PMAD logit-only w0.15/T4 prior five-run mean best 0.520795, std 0.003799, best single 0.524028; teacher checkpoint dformerv2_geometry_primary_teacher-epoch=37-val_mIoU=0.5168.pt. R010 retry1 completed best 0.527469 at epoch 49.
notes: Distinct from failed R001/R003 filtering and R009 feature hint. One hypothesis only: repeat the best existing logit-only KD setting as run06. The first run06 launch failed before validation with forrtl window-CLOSE; completed evidence is run06_retry1.

source: R010 partial-positive TensorBoard/checkpoint evidence plus existing PMAD/PrimKD logit-only repeat history
hypothesis: A second fixed-recipe PMAD logit-only w=0.15/T=4 repeat can test whether the R010 high-tail result is reproducible and may reach the >=0.53 target without changing model structure or training recipe.
proposed_change_scope: No code or model-structure change. Use existing dformerv2_primkd_logit_only with kd_weight=0.15, kd_temperature=4.0, frozen geometry-primary teacher, and save_student_only as run07.
expected_signal: R010 achieved 0.527469 and the updated six-run PMAD mean is 0.521907. Expected best val/mIoU is 0.517-0.528; success only with real best val/mIoU >=0.53.
risk: Repeat experiments can consume GPU time without adding mechanism novelty; if run07 falls below 0.526, avoid further blind repeats and return to a distinct mechanism.
forbidden_change_check: No dataset split, eval metric, mIoU calculation, validation/test loader, augmentation, optimizer, scheduler, batch size, max_epochs, lr, num_workers, early_stop_patience, backbone, encoder, checkpoint artifact, dataset, pretrained weight, or TensorBoard event log change.
evidence_or_reference: R010 dformerv2_primkd_logit_only_w015_t4_run06_retry1: best val/mIoU 0.527469 at epoch 49 from TensorBoard and checkpoint evidence; R012 completed with best val/mIoU 0.516967 at epoch 43 and exit code 0.
notes: One hypothesis only: repeat the same logit-only KD setting as run07. Distinct from R001/R003 selectors and R009 feature hint. No new model code was changed. Result argues against more blind PMAD w0.15/T4 repeats.

source: SegFormer All-MLP decoder paper/code and DFormer official local LMLPDecoder implementation
hypothesis: Replacing SimpleFPN's top-down additive decoder with a DFormer/SegFormer-style c2-c4 LMLP head may better aggregate fused transformer multi-scale features while avoiding c1 high-resolution noise.
proposed_change_scope: Add an independent LMLP decoder/head and model name dformerv2_lmlp_decoder. Use c2/c3/c4 MLP projections, upsample to c2, concatenate, 1x1 fuse+BN+ReLU+dropout+classifier, then upsample logits to input size. Do not change encoder, backbone, GatedFusion, data, eval, optimizer, scheduler, or fixed recipe.
expected_signal: Given prior decoder-swap negatives, expected best val/mIoU is 0.513-0.524. A result >=0.526 would be valuable; >=0.53 would meet the goal.
risk: Decoder/head swaps have repeatedly underperformed in this project. LMLP may lose c1 detail and could be below baseline, but it gives a clean answer about whether SimpleFPN top-down addition is the bottleneck.
forbidden_change_check: No dataset split, eval metric, mIoU calculation, validation/test loader, augmentation, optimizer, scheduler, batch size, max_epochs, lr, num_workers, early_stop_patience, backbone, encoder, checkpoint artifact, dataset, pretrained weight, or TensorBoard event log change.
evidence_or_reference: Paper: SegFormer: Simple and Efficient Design for Semantic Segmentation with Transformers, https://arxiv.org/abs/2105.15203; official repo: https://github.com/NVlabs/SegFormer; RGB-D DFormer repo: https://github.com/VCIP-RGBD/DFormer; local core: ref_codes/DFormer/models/decoders/LMLPDecoder.py and MLPDecoder.py. R013 completed best val/mIoU 0.517981 at epoch 41.
notes: Distinct from R002 frequency-aware FPN, R006 LightHam/NMF, R011 Lovasz loss, and PMAD/TGGA fusion routes. One hypothesis only: decoder/head aggregation. Result is only +0.000584 over baseline mean and has a 0.027750 best-to-last drop, so do not repeat unchanged.

source: DiffPixelFormer paper/code plus R040/R038/R037 negative c4 cue evidence
hypothesis: DiffPixelFormer-style RGB-depth differential cue can improve c4 gate decisions by explicitly modeling local modality disagreement before fusion, without adding output residuals or changing c1-c3.
proposed_change_scope: Add an independent dformerv2_diffpixel_c4_cue experiment model on the R016 mainline. Keep c1-c3 original GatedFusion. Replace only c4 fusion with a depth projection, normal gate logit, and zero-initialized diff_gate([rgb-depth_proj, abs(rgb-depth_proj)]) correction before sigmoid. Do not change decoder, loss, data, eval, or training recipe.
expected_signal: Expected best val/mIoU 0.532-0.541. A result above R036 0.539790 would justify a stronger differential-cue family; a result below R016 0.541121 should be archived rather than promoted.
risk: c4-only cue may be too low-capacity to beat R016; tuning hidden size or scale would be low decision value. Late-window dips may remain because decoder/overfitting bottlenecks are not directly addressed.
forbidden_change_check: No dataset split, eval metric, mIoU calculation, validation/test loader, augmentation, optimizer, scheduler, batch size, max_epochs, lr, num_workers, early_stop_patience, DFormerv2-S level, DFormerv2-S pretrained loading, label mapping, depth normalization, c1-c3 GatedFusion behavior, SimpleFPNDecoder, checkpoint artifact, dataset, pretrained weight, or TensorBoard event log change.
evidence_or_reference: Paper/code: DiffPixelFormer arXiv:2511.13047, official repo github.com/gongyan1/DiffPixelFormer. Local result: R041 completed best val/mIoU 0.537098 at validation epoch 44, last 0.529552, TensorBoard-backed evidence in final daima/miou_list/R041_diffpixel_c4_cue_run01.md.
notes: R041 beats R040/R038/R037 but remains below R036 and R016. Archive exact module under feiqi and do not tune hidden size/scale; use only as evidence that differential cues are more useful than prompt/sparse c4 variants.

source: R041 differential-cue partial-positive evidence plus DiffPixelFormer paper/code and R042 subagent planner/codebase gate
hypothesis: A c3 RGB-depth differential cue propagated to c4 can condition high-level GatedFusion better than R041's c4-only local difference, without changing c3 outputs or adding output residuals.
proposed_change_scope: Add independent dformerv2_diffpixel_c3toc4_cue experiment model. Keep c1-c3 original GatedFusion outputs. Replace c4 fusion with a c4 gate/refine module whose gate logit adds a zero-initialized downsampled cue from c3 [rgb-depth_proj, abs(rgb-depth_proj)]. Do not change decoder, loss, data, eval, or training recipe.
expected_signal: Expected best val/mIoU 0.535-0.543. A result above R041 0.537098 shows propagated differential cue value; above R016 0.541121 is a corrected-baseline improvement candidate.
risk: Using c3 information may reintroduce mid-level noise; zero-init means c3 depth-proj receives zero first-step gradient but the final cue projection receives nonzero gradient and opens after training starts. If below R041, stop differential-cue propagation.
forbidden_change_check: No dataset split, eval metric, mIoU calculation, validation/test loader, augmentation, optimizer, scheduler, batch size, max_epochs, lr, num_workers, early_stop_patience, DFormerv2-S level, DFormerv2-S pretrained loading, label mapping, depth normalization, SimpleFPNDecoder, c1-c3 GatedFusion outputs, checkpoint artifact, dataset, pretrained weight, or TensorBoard event log change.
evidence_or_reference: DiffPixelFormer arXiv:2511.13047 and official repo github.com/gongyan1/DiffPixelFormer motivate differential RGB-D cueing. R041 local c4-only cue reached best 0.537098; R042 completed best 0.530729 at validation epoch 43 and last 0.458179.
notes: One hypothesis only: whether c3 disagreement can help c4 gate decisions. Result is below R041/R036/R016 and has severe late collapse; archive exact module and do not tune hidden size/scale.

source: R042 negative c3-propagation result plus explicit depth geometry literature/code gate
hypothesis: A c4-only raw-depth Sobel/normal-like geometry cue can improve high-level gate decisions more safely than RGB-depth feature disagreement, aligning with DFormerv2 geometry-prior motivation.
proposed_change_scope: Add independent dformerv2_depthgeo_c4_cue model. Keep c1-c3 original GatedFusion outputs and SimpleFPNDecoder unchanged. Replace only c4 fusion with original gate/refine logic plus a zero-initialized gate-logit correction from on-the-fly depth Sobel dx/dy, normal-like nx/ny/nz, and magnitude cue. Do not alter dataloader preprocessing.
expected_signal: Expected best val/mIoU 0.538-0.547. A result above R041 0.537098 shows explicit depth geometry value; above R016 0.541121 is a corrected-baseline improvement candidate.
risk: Depth is normalized rather than metric physical depth, so normal cue is approximate; c4-only cue may be too weak; depth discontinuities may not match semantic boundaries.
forbidden_change_check: No dataset split, eval metric, mIoU calculation, validation/test loader, augmentation, optimizer, scheduler, batch size, max_epochs, lr, num_workers, early_stop_patience, DFormerv2-S level, DFormerv2-S pretrained loading, label mapping, depth normalization, SimpleFPNDecoder, c1-c3 GatedFusion outputs, checkpoint artifact, dataset, pretrained weight, or TensorBoard event log change.
evidence_or_reference: DFormerv2 CVPR 2025 supports geometry-prior RGB-D segmentation. GANet/ShapeConv-style geometry-aware convolution and Project-and-Fuse depth-to-normal tendencies motivate explicit depth derivative cues. R042 shows c3 feature-diff propagation is harmful; R043 tests raw depth geometry at c4 only. R043 completed best val/mIoU 0.535592 at validation epoch 42 and last 0.522214.
notes: Branch exp/R043-depthgeo-c4-cue-v1, model dformerv2_depthgeo_c4_cue, run R043_depthgeo_c4_cue_run01. Smoke and full train completed. Result is safer than R042 but below R041/R036/R016, so archive exact module and avoid Sobel/normal c4 cue micro-search.

source: CAFuser/DGFusion condition-aware fusion reading plus R036 bounded residual partial-positive evidence
hypothesis: R036's c3/c4 bounded depth residual underuses image-specific context because alpha is a global static scalar; conditioning the c3/c4 residual amplitude on DFormerv2 c4 global pooled features may selectively open depth residuals per image/channel while preserving the original GatedFusion base.
proposed_change_scope: Add independent dformerv2_conditioned_c34_bounded_residual model. Keep c1/c2 original GatedFusion, keep c3/c4 original GatedFusion as the base inside a wrapper, add only a zero-initialized bounded residual multiplied by image-conditioned channel alpha from c4 global pooled DFormerv2 features. Do not alter decoder, loss, data, eval, or training recipe.
expected_signal: Expected best val/mIoU 0.534-0.545. A result above R036 0.539790 indicates conditioned residual value; a result above R016 0.541121 is a corrected-baseline improvement candidate; >=0.545 is strong signal toward the next stage.
risk: High overlap risk with R036 if implemented as alpha/hidden-size tuning. Must not touch gate logits or add c3-to-c4/raw-depth cues. If alpha opens but mIoU does not beat R016, stop condition-residual micro-search.
forbidden_change_check: No dataset split, eval metric, mIoU calculation, validation/test loader, augmentation, optimizer, scheduler, batch size, max_epochs, lr, num_workers, early_stop_patience, loss, DFormerv2-S level, DFormerv2-S pretrained loading, DepthEncoder structure, SimpleFPNDecoder, checkpoint artifact, dataset, pretrained weight, or TensorBoard event log change.
evidence_or_reference: CAFuser RA-L 2025 (https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.10791, https://github.com/timbroed/CAFuser) uses condition-aware fusion weights; local core code read at ref_codes/CAFuser/cafuser/modeling/modality_fusion/querry_guided_addition.py and querry_guided_pca.py. DGFusion RA-L 2026 (https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.09828, https://github.com/timbroed/DGFusion) motivates depth-token conditioned fusion. R036 reached 0.539790 with static c3/c4 bounded residual but stayed below R016.
notes: Full train completed 50 validation epochs with best val/mIoU 0.535663 at validation epoch 49, last 0.520020, and best-to-last drop 0.015643. c3 alpha saturated near the 0.05 cap while residual_abs kept growing. Below R016/R036/R041; archive code and do not tune alpha bound or hidden size.

source: StitchFusion/KTB-style zero-init bottleneck adapter reading plus R019/R020/R036/R044 history gate
hypothesis: R016 may need lightweight high-stage modality adaptation before GatedFusion rather than depth input conversion or output residual correction. A zero-initialized c3/c4 bottleneck adapter on RGB and depth features can start exactly from R016 while learning small modality-specific corrections in the feature stream.
proposed_change_scope: Add independent dformerv2_c34_zero_init_modality_adapter model. Keep c1/c2 unchanged. For c3/c4 only, pass DFormerv2 and aligned DepthEncoder features through separate Conv1x1-ReLU-Conv1x1 adapters whose final conv is zero-initialized, then feed the adapted features into the original GatedFusion modules and unchanged SimpleFPNDecoder. Log adapter delta magnitudes. Do not change decoder, GatedFusion class, loss, data, eval, or training recipe.
expected_signal: Expected best val/mIoU 0.536-0.545. A result above R016 0.541121 indicates a corrected-baseline improvement candidate; >=0.545 is strong signal toward the 0.55 stage. A stable last >=0.535 would also be useful even if best is near R016.
risk: Moderate overlap with prior adapter/residual families. It must remain c3/c4-only and zero-init; if best stays below 0.536 or adapter deltas open without mIoU gain, stop this adapter family rather than tuning reduction/scale.
forbidden_change_check: No dataset split, eval metric, mIoU calculation, validation/test loader, augmentation, optimizer, scheduler, batch size, max_epochs, lr, num_workers, early_stop_patience, loss, DFormerv2-S level, DFormerv2-S pretrained loading, DepthEncoder structure, SimpleFPNDecoder, checkpoint artifact, dataset, pretrained weight, or TensorBoard event log change.
evidence_or_reference: Subagent paper-code gate reported StitchFusion Bi_direct_adapter and KTB/MAPA-style Adapter evidence for small zero-init residual adapters. Local history distinguishes this from R019/R020 depth input adapters and R036/R044 output residual corrections. Active code smoke passed with initial adapter deltas exactly 0.0 and nonzero gradient to the zero-init final conv.
notes: Selected over SimpleFPN channel-spatial refinement because decoder/head small repairs are already weakly supported by R021/R022/R031/R033, while zero-init feature adapters have stronger 2025 multimodal paper/code support and preserve R016 at initialization.

source: DGFusion arXiv 2509.09828 official repo plus R038/R041/R043/R045 negative gate
hypothesis: A DGFusion-style c4 local depth-token interaction can provide learned local geometry-conditioned feature correction on top of the existing R016 GatedFusion c4 output without replacing GatedFusion or changing decoder/loss/training recipe.
proposed_change_scope: Add independent dformerv2_dgfusion_c4_depth_token model. Keep c1-c3 original GatedFusion outputs. For c4, compute base output with the original GatedFusion, pool aligned c4 depth features locally into a depth token, compute lightweight normalized query/key affinity between fused c4 and depth token, and add a zero-initialized feature residual before the unchanged SimpleFPNDecoder. Log c4 token delta and affinity diagnostics.
expected_signal: Expected best val/mIoU 0.536-0.545. A result above R016 0.541121 is a corrected-baseline improvement candidate; >=0.545 is a strong signal toward 0.55. A stable last >=0.535 with drop <0.010 would also be meaningful.
risk: Moderate overlap with c4 fusion/cue experiments. Must not use sampling offsets like R038, rgb-depth diff gate logits like R041, raw-depth Sobel cues like R043, or self-adapters like R045. If delta/affinity opens without mIoU gain, stop DGFusion-lite instead of tuning window/token/scale.
forbidden_change_check: No dataset split, eval metric, mIoU calculation, validation/test loader, augmentation, optimizer, scheduler, batch size, max_epochs, lr, num_workers, early_stop_patience, loss, DFormerv2-S level, DFormerv2-S pretrained loading, DepthEncoder structure, SimpleFPNDecoder, GatedFusion class, checkpoint artifact, dataset, pretrained weight, or TensorBoard event log change.
evidence_or_reference: Paper: DGFusion arXiv 2509.09828; official repo: https://github.com/timbroed/DGFusion; core file: dgfusion/modeling/modality_fusion/depth_token_guided_pca.py with MultiWindowCrossAttention, DepthTokenGuidedFusionBlock, and DepthTokenGuidedPCA. Only the c4 local depth-token idea is ported; no Detectron2/OneFormer framework, global condition token, auxiliary depth head, or training-code dependency is copied.
notes: Completed full train: best 0.531838 at validation epoch 44, last 0.527239, drop 0.004599. Evidence/report written; failed code archived to final daima/feiqi/failed_experiments_r046_20260516. Rejected below R016/R036/R041; do not tune DGFusion-lite window/token/scale.
